title: NTA CSIR-UGC NET June 2026 Online Form

content.text: NTA CSIR-UGC NET June 2026 : Get complete details about NTA CSIR-UGC NET June 2026, including examination updates, important dates, application fees, eligibility criteria, age limit, selection process, syllabus, exam pattern, admit card, answer key, result, and more.

rows.text: National Testing Agency (NTA) Joint CSIR-UGC NET June 2026 Short Details of Notification

Notification Out : 27/05/2026 Starting Date : 27/05/2026 Last Date : 19/06/2026 11:50 PM Fees Last Date : 20/06/2026 11:50 PM Correction Date : 22-23 June 2026 Exam Date : 17-18 July 2026 Admit Card : Available Soon
General : 1150/- OBC / EWS : 600/- SC / ST / PH : 325/- Third Gender : 325/- Payment Mode : Online Mode
Junior Research Fellowship (JRF) : Max. 30 Years Asst. Professor & Admission to Ph.D. : No Age Limit The Age Limit as on : 01/07/2026 The Age Relaxation Extra as per Rules.

rows.text: Master’s Degree with (Gen / EWS 55% Marks, SC / ST / OBC / PH : 50% Marks). Integrated Course / 04 Years Bachelor’s Degree Holder Candidates Are Also Eligible for CSIR UGC NET June 2026. Read Notification For More Details.
